title: Wiltshire Mini Silicone Kitchen Tongs, 18cm, Cooking & Serving Tongs, Salad & BBQ Tongs, Stainless Steel, Heat-Resistant Utensil, Non-Stick, Non-Scratch Tip, Studio Pink, 21x3.2x2.7cm
features: Serving up a storm: the easy-to-use mini silicone tongs are ideal for use on non-stick cookware, perfect for basic kitchen tasks, indoor or outdoor, for grilling corn, serving roast meat, turning burgers, serving salad, pasta, or as BBQ turners and much more
Material: non-stick safe silicone function head that is safe on coated pots and pans, heat resistant up to 220°C, stainless steel handle with non-slip soft grip inlay
Care: dishwasher safe, for that extra sparkle we recommend to wash by hand and dry thoroughly
Useful: the designed hole makes it easy to hang your mini kitchen tongs and store them easily, with handy push and pull locking mechanism
1 x Wiltshire Mini Silicone Kitchen Tongs 18cm, Cooking & Serving Tongs, Salad & BBQ Tongs, Stainless Steel, Heat-Resistant Utensil, Non-Stick, Non-Scratch Tip, Studio Pink, 21x3.2x2.7cm
description: The Wiltshire silicone collection has a contemporary and stylish design to add elegance to your kitchen and comfort when cooking. There is no more beloved kitchen tool than the humble tong. These easy-to-use Mini Silicone Tongs are ideal for use on non-stick cookware and serving up a storm. The Wiltshire Mini Silicone Tongs are made from durable stainless steel, 100% food safe silicone and are heat resistant up to 220°C. Plus, they are dishwasher safe, so that's one less thing you will need to do.
